_comment: mdvs Codex hook config. Generated by `mdvs scaffold hook --platform codex`. Merge into your existing .codex/hooks.json (or the [hooks] table in ~/.codex/config.toml). The script paths are relative to the project root; adjust if you install them elsewhere. Both hooks self-scope by walking up from the agent's cwd to find an `mdvs.toml` — they stay silent outside an mdvs vault. Tool matcher names (Edit/Write/MultiEdit/Bash) follow the Claude Code convention; verify they match your Codex version.
